features.featureTitle: In the frontend role submission logic, convert the plain string role value to the correct Candid opt variant format before sending to the backend. Specifically: map "customer" → [{ customer: null }], "driver" → [{ driver: null }], and "admin" → [{ admin: null }]. This conversion must be applied wherever a role is submitted to the backend (e.g., useQueries.ts updateRole mutation, SelectRolePage.tsx, RoleSelectionWarningModal.tsx).
